title: ConSpan culvert — mild Q ramp unsteady (mode 0)

parity_program.notes: Q ramp 600→1000 cfs (u07), DS stage 30.51 ft, plan p08. Post-step culvert coupling (mode 0).

scope.notes: Arch culvert outlet-controlled entire ramp. Compare WSEL(t) vs HEC-RAS p08 HDF.

linked_project.notes: u07/p08 copied from user HEC-RAS 7.01 project when available.

stream1d.notes: Implicit culvert residual in Preissmann Jacobian + reach–structure–reach outer loop until converged.
